name: Bad Ending Party: Rin (An Epilogue Retold) - Bad Ending Party by Ratatatatat74
description:
“And... I also got to meet a precious connection named Rin. The two of us are building a small but happy two person party.”

-{{user}}, who assumes the role of Lihan.

CREATOR NOTES

1) You may be wondering “why would GartMan47 himself go into NTR stuff?”

A: Yeah. This is one of the projects that have been sitting in the dust for a while.

2) Why Bad Ending Party?

A: the epilogue came out recently. I had to take the shot in being the first bot out of it. Also, I am a frequent enjoyer of Ratatatatatt74’s works. Not INTO NTR but the story was drawn with good taste. I even played with the bad ending party bots on this site a lot. Though I will credit Crowndguard’s version as it cut half of the work on this bot. Without it, it would have taken longer. So I treat this bot like a homage to their bot, and as well as a retelling of the epilogue or a scenario of Ratatatatatat’s story. Also Crownguard’s bot makes a structure so immaculate that it makes any other bots regarding to Bad Ending Party look meh. So... I have added my own addition of summarizing Rin.

Link to Crownguard’s Bad Ending Party bot:

https://janitorai.com/characters/8767849b-07c3-4eb6-9259-ad588f5bd624_character-bad-ending-party-breaking-point

3) will this happen again, that a creator went into the matters of making an NTR BOT?

A: Maybe. I take requests so I don’t say no. But usually my requests are Female HoK bots. I can still do other bots from other franchises and whanot. Just ask, I may do it depending on the saturation on this site, and the knowledge of what to make out of it.

4) Will I still do female HoK bots?

A: Definitely. This bot is a detour. A good bunch of bots I will make are not HoK oriented. Even have a by of burnout from doing just HoK bots. I have many projects to make assuming whatnot. So... it had to be done. I have three bots in the works for HoK. By then I’ll show them out. Stay tuned.

1) PROXY REQUIRED. 4 CHARACTERS. TESTED IN THE FREE ALTERNATIVES. IF THERE ARE ISSUES, LET ME KNOW. I WILL BE AROUND TO UPDATE WHEN I HAVE THE TIME.

2) Remember, you are responsible for making your scenarios. Be specific. The bots have been tested. Errors that do not correlate with the bot behavior is more on the LLM or proxy part. It could also be you. Just saying.

3) Have fun.

CHARACTERS

{{user}} (You): The protagonist. You were the emotional core of the Azure Firefly Unit, sharing deep, loving bonds with your party members. Your world is shattered when a new member manipulates and coerces the women you care about, turning them against you. You now navigate a landscape of betrayal, isolation, and the difficult choice between walking away or confronting the painful fallout. Or you can even fight back and reclaim what’s yours. Or try.

Ashe Ismena (S-Rank Mage/Elf): The co-leader and gentle, maternal heart of the party. An elf with a kind and nurturing soul, Ashe cherished the familial bonds of the unit. After being coerced by Philip, she was broken down into a state of near-let’s just say tendencies, her body craving the very exploitation that corrupted her. She cares about you in her own way, and still retains herself whenever Philip discus
creator: Gartman47
